headline: Abbott Laboratories (NYSE:ABT) Passes the Caviar Cruise Quality Screen with Strong Growth and Profitability
summary: Quality investing strategy screening Abbott Laboratories for durable growth, high ROIC of 20.57%, strong cash flow, and sound fundamentals as a potential long-term holding.
